examples: I have never forgotten that number, and it always comes to memory attended by gibbering obscenity, peals of joyless laughter and the clang of iron doors.
The holiday had become joyless for Gail.
Even on calm days, Tehran wears a scowling, joyless aspect.
No wonder their business is so often done in joyless basements and choked corridors.
Richard Bruton, finance spokesman for the opposition Fine Gael party, called the budget "jobless and joyless".
